chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.347 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Disposed of matter 1. For orders on M.A. No.2497/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.2498/2026 (Return of surety) ----------------------------------------------------- 17.02.2026 Mr. Fahad Hussain Gopang, advocate for applicant/surety ------------------------------------- Along with urgent application, applicant/surety has moved application for return of surety. It appears that protective bail was granted to applicant Raham Hussain Waswano son of Shah Bux by this Court vide order dated 02.02.2026, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court for a period of five days. As per Nazir’s endorsement one Ghulam Sarwar son of Muhammad Arbab furnished surety by way of depositing cash amount Rs.50,000/-. Counsel for applicant/surety submits that applicant/ accused above named surrendered before learned Additional Sessions Judge-I/MCTC Sanghar and was admitted to interim pre-arrest bail vide order dated 06.02.2026. Copy of order dated 06.02.2026 has been placed on record. Mr. Muhammad Ishaque, learned Assistant Attorney General present in Court in some other cases, waives notice and after having gone through the case file and aforesaid order has recorded his no objection for return of surety. In view of above, surety furnished by the applicant/ surety is no more required. Application for return of surety is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety to the applicant/surety upon proper verification and identification, as per rules.
Application for return of surety is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety to the applicant/surety upon proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
